items.title: INJURY REPORT: Who’s OUT for Notre Dame Football this spring?
items.summary: The spring practice season for Noytre Dame Football is now underway, and we have a new injury report for Irish players. items.title: Notre Dame Football: Running back Aneyas Williams will be limited this spring
items.summary: The Notre Dame Fighting Irish are predicted to have a massive season in 2026 and are one of the favorites to win a national championship. Notre Dame’s roster is stacked, but they do have to replace a generational backfield in running backs Jadarian Price and Jeremiyah Love. The key player to take that leap to […]

items.title: Summon your Notre Dame hate for the schools turning down the NIT
items.summary: When the Notre Dame Football program decided to opt out of the bowl game after being screwed by the college football playoff committee, the columns and podcasts by Notre Dame haters went LUDICROUS SPEED and condemned the decision. items.title: Details for Lou Holtz’s funeral at Notre Dame
items.summary: The University of Notre Dame released details of Lou Holtz’s public funural to be held inside the Basilica of the Sacred Heart. There was a public visitation for the legendary Irish football coach on Sunday from 7:00-10:00. The University is sharing opportunities for the extended Notre Dame family, including the campus community, to pay their […]
